title: DANS Data Access Protocol Template
author: Braukmann, Ricarda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This template was created to describe the data access conditions for restricted access datasets deposited in  the DANS Data Stations . It can serve as a template for other repositories as well. The template is a supplement to the  DANS Guidebook – Depositing Restricted Access In The DANS Data Stations.
steps_raw: This template was created to describe the data access conditions for restricted access datasets deposited in  the DANS Data Stations . It can serve as a template for other repositories as well. The template is a supplement to the  DANS Guidebook – Depositing Restricted Access In The DANS Data Stations.
